misc: Has been working on his mental game a lot
biography: Eero, the pride of Vuosaari Golf Helsinki, is known for his calm demeanor on the course and his relentless pursuit of improvement. He is the younger brother of Pasi, another familiar face in the golf scene.

While the coveted Hector Trophée has eluded him thus far, Eero has tasted individual glory, having secured the Victor Trophy once in the past. His dedication to the sport is evident in his multiple appearances at the Hector Trophée event, showcasing his commitment to this tournament.

Eero has been working diligently on his mental fortitude, seeking to elevate his game to new heights. While he is not scheduled to participate in Hector Trophée 2026, golf enthusiasts know that last-minute changes are always possible, and the prospect of seeing Eero compete once again remains a tantalizing possibility.
